highlights.text: This is the Failed Breakdown (my core setup).
I wrote Tuesday at 4pm: “The obvious setup is the Failed Breakdown of todays low at 6901.” We saw exactly this after FOMC.
I wrote Wednesday at 4pm: “The obvious setup is the Failed Breakdown of today’s daily low at 6882.
I wrote in yesterday’s newsletter: “One can try the 6841-43 if its a controlled dip.” We held 6843 exact, put in a big Failed Breakdown of yesterday’s low, and ripped to 6900 to close the week.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into some of the Failed Breakdowns we’ve seen this week because its been a very active week for them.
If you understand the Failed Breakdowns we’ve seen this week, you understand Failed Breakdowns.
ES plunged 60 points again, losing Wednesday’s daily low of 6882 down to 6869.

post_title: After A 250+ Point Squeeze, SPX Is Coiling. Another Leg Up Coming, Or Are Bulls Done? Nov 3rd Plan
